details: This combosquat of the Chai test library is a dropper. Its index.js spawns a detached, unref'd background node process running a payload that fetches stage-2 code from hxxp://statecheck[.]ddns[.]net/api/scanner.js via axios using a hardcoded HTTP Basic auth header (base64 YWRtaW46c2VjcmV0MTIz, i.e. admin:secret123), then executes it with new Function("require", s), giving the remote code full require access. The publisher impersonates real Chai maintainers. chai-utils-test@4.5.2 is a combosquat of the chai assertion library acting as a multi-stage remote-code-execution dropper. Its index.js spawns a detached background node process (detached:true, child.unref()) running a bundled payload file that uses axios to fetch stage-2 code from hxxps://statecheck[.]ddns[.]net/api/scanner.js with hardcoded base64 Basic-auth credentials (admin:secret123), then executes the response via new Function("require", s), granting the operator full require access. The publisher impersonates the real Chai maintainers.
